19.reason: Error: This extra read consumes the next token, but pop operation (0) has no following value. This causes misalignment of input parsing.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.25 , reason:  For pop (0) or end (-1), this reads the next integer, which is incorrect. The next input should be the next operation, not read here. Also, the format string "%d " has the same issue.

9.reason: Error: Condition should check if stack is full, i.e., i>=99. i==100 will never be true because i is index (max 99) when full. This results in stack overflow without proper error detection.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  // condition should be i>=99 for full stack (array size 100)
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: Condition should check if stack is full, i.e., i>=99. i==100 will never be true because i is index (max 99) when full. This results in stack overflow without proper error detection.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.2 , reason:  Off-by-one error: array size is 100 (indices 0-99), so stack is full when i==99. Checking i==100 allows out-of-bounds access to b[100].
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  Off-by-one error: array b has size 100 (indices 0-99). Stack is full when i==99, so condition should be i==99.
